category_sources: source_facts.description says it measures network performance; official SourceForge categories include Network Monitoring and Benchmark.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is thrulay; official SourceForge project page heading is thrulay.
docs_sources: Official SourceForge project page links to the thrulay Web Site at thrulay.sourceforge.io; used as the best official documentation surface found.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; inspected official SourceForge project page and found downloads/web site but no official source-control repository URL.
tags_sources: Official SourceForge summary says thrulay measures capacity, delay, and other network performance metrics using bulk TCP or UDP streams; source_facts.executables lists CLI/server binaries.
